item.title: Faqs Clash of spears V7
item.dc:creator: Honorio Gómez
item.description: Últimas faqs de Clash of Spears - Tras algunas partidas con mi buen amigo Alex a Clash of spears (un reglamento al que últimamente estamos enganchados) , nos surgieron algunas dudas y detectamos tambien erratas en el libro y en clash calculator , la web “oficial” para realizar listas. Buscamos faqs del juego en diversas webs (incluyendo...

item.title: Battle report Romans vs Gauls
item.dc:creator: Honorio Gómez
item.description: Clash of spears battle report - This post is written in english. En el año 240 a. C., cuando la influencia de la República romana avanzaba cada vez más hacia las tierras del norte, los ríos marcaban fronteras naturales entre dos mundos distintos. Para Roma, el puente de madera que cruzaba aquel río era una vía...

item.title: Sample blog post to learn markdown tips
item.dc:creator: Bill Smith
item.description: There's lots to learn! - This is a demo post to show you how to write blog posts with markdown. I strongly encourage you to take 5 minutes to learn how to write in markdown - it’ll teach you how to transform regular text into bold/italics/tables/etc.I also encourage you to look at the code that...

item.title: Flake it till you make it
item.dc:creator: Sharon Smith and Barry Simpson
item.description: Excerpt from Soulshaping by Jeff Brown - Under what circumstances should we step off a path? When is it essential that we finish what we start? If I bought a bag of peanuts and had an allergic reaction, no one would fault me if I threw it out. If I ended a relationship with a woman who...
